title: PoW difficulty cap mismatch: transport accepts up to 60, verify_token rejects >30
description: core/src/transport.rs line 389 rejects relay-advertised difficulty > 60. core/src/pow.rs MAX_DIFFICULTY = 30, and verify_token() returns InvalidDifficulty for diff > 30. relay/src/main.rs enforces a minimum of 20 but has no maximum cap. If an operator sets POW_DIFFICULTY=31 (or 31-60), the client mines a valid-looking token with diff=31, sends it, and the relay's verify_token rejects it as InvalidDifficulty, causing permanent auth failure. The transport client and the pow verifier have different ceilings (60 vs 30). Fix: transport.rs should reject difficulty > pow::MAX_DIFFICULTY (30), and relay/src/main.rs should clamp at MAX_DIFFICULTY on startup.
